what_was_done: Deep research comparison of Clude (blockchain-based AI memory) vs Torus framework. 6 rounds of iterative scoring with 5 user corrections. Final: Torus 83.7 vs Clude 54.4. Zero ideas worth adopting. Confirmed Gate 10 model profiles (5 profiles x 4 roles) don't conflict with budget toggle. All corrections saved to memory. No code changes.
next_steps: Build Claude API adapter for agent-bench (real API scoring)
known_issues: Plan mode exit loop - platform limitation, mitigated by behavioral rule
ChromaDB concurrent access - tests skip when MCP running, correct behavior
